title: Sinapovo
summary:
Sinapovo (Bulgarian: Синапово, Greek: Σιναπλή) is a village in the municipality of Topolovgrad, in Haskovo Province, in southern Bulgaria.


== References ==
text: Sinapovo (Bulgarian: Синапово, Greek: Σιναπλή) is a village in the municipality of Topolovgrad, in Haskovo Province, in southern Bulgaria.
